events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 6,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Free conductor length is less than 6 inches at box termination — does not meet NEC 300.14 minimum",
    "Insufficient conductor length prevents proper splicing, termination, and device installation",
    "Installed-defective condition: conductors are too short to be made up to devices or splices without extension"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace or extend conductors to provide minimum 6 in. free length at each box per NEC 300.14",
    "If extension is used, ensure splice method is listed and approved for the application",
    "Re-inspect all box terminations on this circuit run for similar short-conductor conditions"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 300.14 requires at least 6 inches of free conductor at every box, outlet, or junction point for splicing or termination. A measured free length under 6 inches is a direct code violation and an installed-defective condition because the conductor cannot be properly terminated or spliced. At rough-complete stage this must be corrected before closeout.",
  "references": ["NEC 300.14", "NEC 314.16", "NEC 314.28"]
}
